Welcome to the Forum Archive!

Years of conversation fill a ton of digital pages, and we've kept all of it accessible to browse or copy over. Whether you're looking for reveal articles for older champions, or the first time that Rammus rolled into an "OK" thread, or anything in between, you can find it here. When you're finished, check out the boards to join in the latest League of Legends discussions.

GO TO BOARDS

Week 3 Release Notes

123

Pendragon

Director of Player Experience

07-02-2009

Ability Changes

  • Cardmasters Seal Fate buff duration changed from 1/2/3/4/5 to 3/4/5/6/7
  • Cardmasters Wildcard variable damage changed from 1-15/30/45/60/75 to 1-20/40/60/80/100
  • Cardmasters Gate spell cast time changed from 4 seconds to 3 seconds
  • Cardmasters Destiny cooldown changed from 180/150/120 to 120/90/60 and slow effect increased from 33% to 40%, but duration reduced from 4 seconds to 3 seconds
  • Yetis Absolute Zero damage changed from 500/800/1200 to 500/750/1000
  • Sivirs Spiral Blade projective speed increased, blade width decreased, and damage changed from 80/110/140/170/200 to 80/105/130/155/180
  • Sivirs Ricochet mana cost reduced from 5 to 4, and damage decrease per bounce reduced from 30% to 25%
  • Sivirs On the Hunt attack speed bonus changed from 20/40/60% to 25/50/75%, and movement speed bonus changed from 35% to 40%
  • Master Yis Meditate cooldown changed from 60 seconds to 50 seconds, and channel duration changed from 10 seconds to 8 sections
  • Master Yis Wuju Style mana cost decreased from 5 to 4, damage increased from 10/15/20/25/30 to 15/20/25/30/35, and attack speed increased from 10/15/20/25/30 to 15/20/25/30/35
  • Master Yis Alpha Strike mana cost reduced from 150/175/200 to 150 at all levels, and cooldown changed from 140/120/100 to 150/120/90. Additionally, he now bounces to 10/10/10 targets, and damage done to champions will now scale with attack damage
  • Tristanas Rapid Fire buff duration decreased from 14 seconds to 7 seconds, attack speed increased from 25/35/45/55/65% to 40/60/80/100/120%, and cooldown reduced to 20 seconds from 30 seconds
  • Tristanas Draw a Beat no longer slows, and is always on
  • Tristanas Buster Shot damage changed from 325/465/675 to 300/450/600, cooldown changed from 100/75/50 to 90/75/60, and mana cost reduced from 200 to 150. Additionally it will now push back all enemies around the target, instead of just the target itself
  • Summoner Teleport no longer makes the target invulnerable
  • Summoner Rally Damage increase changed from 30% to 35%, and ability power increased from 15% to 20%
  • Summoner Fortify buff duration increased from 5 seconds to 6 seconds
  • Summoner Haste name changed to Summoner Ghost, and now allows you to walk through units
  • Annies Pyromania spell casts required for a stun increased from 4 to 5
  • Annies Disintegrate damage reduced from 80/130/180/230/280 to 80/125/170/215/260 and ability power ratio changed from 75% to 60%
  • Ryzes Overload damage bonus changed from 20% of current mana, to 12% of current mana

Ability Bug Fixes
  • Fixed a bug where Master Yis Double Strike would not work correctly on inhibitors
  • Improved movement speed tooltips on all boots
  • Fixed a bug that occurred when Fiddlesticks died while channeling Life Drain
  • Fixed a bug where Teemos Move Quick did not toggle off properly after taking damage
  • Fixed a bug where Teemo was not getting bonus damage from items with his Toxic Shot active

Summoner
  • Added icons, borders, and backgrounds for summoner items
  • Added additional functional tabs on the Champion Select screen
  • Summoner Detail Bars on Champion Selection are no longer randomized
  • Bugs Fixed
    • Summoner talents now work
    • Fixed issue where it appeared you could edit the talents of other summoners when viewing their talent trees
    • Fixed a bug where your summoner equipment would sometimes not get saved
    • Removed the Summoner search field after you have entered a game
    • Fixed a bug that caused players to lose talent points
    • Fixed a bug where the Summoner Tree backgrounds were in the incorrect places
    • Fixed a scrollbar issue when changing item categories on the Equip Summoner page
    • Some summoner items have different stats than the tooltip states

-28
